Module 1: Introduction
!
Executive Summary
Welcome to Module 1. You are now part of the Product Launch Formula
family!
This module is all about the core strategies and tactics of Product Launch
Formula. You’ll learn how to build valuable relationships and have an
ongoing conversation with your prospects, clients, and customers. If you go
through just this module alone, you can radically change your marketing
and business.
Now if you’re upgrading from a previous version of PLF, there is a lot of
new content and you will still learn a ton. If you’re a new PLF owner, rest
assured that you’ll get best pricing on future versions of PLF.
Here’s the key as you go through this course: don’t feel like you have to
keep up with every single video
“Be gentle with yourself” - almost no one gets through everything on time,
so don’t lose momentum or feel bad if you fall behind
You’ll also be exposed to some core personal development concepts.
There is some inner work required in order to truly build a successful
business
!
!

Key Takeaway
PLF is about how to launch products and brands - but also how to create
a serious business
You must find out what your prospects/customers need. Once you know
this you simply tie it into your marketing and deliver it in your content
!
Action Step
Take part in the community - this is key! Head to the portal and click on
“PLF Community” in the top-right hand corner - join the conversation
The PLF community is very strong and is all about bringing value, we
don’t suffer grumpy people. Some people have been kicked out of the
community for having a bad attitude, although 99% of people are
absolute superstars!
It’s all about baby steps…so let’s go get ‘em!
!
